info.name: Healthcare Scheduling System - GraphQL
info.description: Manual tester mode: fill required values in Collection Variables inside Postman. No environment input variables required.

exec: pm.test("Register has no GraphQL errors", function () { pm.expect(json.errors, JSON.stringify(json.errors)).to.be.undefined; });
pm.test("Login has no GraphQL errors", function () { pm.expect(json.errors, JSON.stringify(json.errors)).to.be.undefined; });

pm.test("Delete customer request sent", function () { pm.expect([200, 400, 404]).to.include(status); });

pm.test("Delete doctor request sent", function () { pm.expect([200, 400, 404]).to.include(status); });
